title: Home espresso machine under $500
goal: Find a well-reviewed home espresso machine under $500 that includes a milk steamer.
rubric: Real espresso machine under $500 with steam wand, 4+ stars.
final_answer: Breville Bambino Plus, $499 (frequently $399 on Amazon), 4.7★, includes auto-frothing wand. Under the $500 ceiling when on sale.
